package rulecoverage

func NegativeSqlRowsScanLogicOutsideRepository() string {
    ruleID := "sql_rows_scan_logic_outside_repository"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Code outside repositories that manually scans rows into structs."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
